items.name_en: 《 packaging》💖 M's most special style this year, the Biker Bag, features new vintage soft-touch lambskin. Classic retro charm, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile, sweet or edgy, large capacity. Almost every celebrity and fashion blogger has one, as popular as the previous MiuWander.

items.name_en: 《With full original counter packaging》!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Small (19cm) Bowling Tote/Shoulder Bag~Brown Sheepskin
items.name_cn:
《With full original counter packaging》!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Small (19cm) Bowling Tote/Shoulder Bag~Brown Sheepskin
This tote features Matelasse craftsmanship, offering a fresh interpretation of a classic silhouette with a 3D texture and exquisite texture. The front letter logo and metal hardware subtly complement each other, with exquisite workmanship that stands out, showcasing a highly recognizable classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with a modern charm.
~Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
~Zipper closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB123.
Size: W19×H13×Dcm.
Color: Brown full leather/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_cn:
【Premium Hardware, Original Leather】Wander Matelasse Suede Hobo Handbag/Shoulder Bag~20cm Silver Suede
Original leather, comes with picture packaging
The Wander handbag has become a classic accessory. This mini bag is crafted from Matalasse suede, featuring exquisite craftsmanship and a three-dimensional effect that exudes elegance. With a Hobo silhouette, it blends vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of a modern woman's temperament.
~Gold hardware
~Zipper closure
~Front metal-engraved logo
~Cotton satin lining
Dimensions: W20×H17×D6cm
